contract_purpose: Manages bounty escrow with multi-token support, capability-based authorization, two-step admin rotation with timelock, refund-eligibility views, fee configuration, participant filter pagination with audit events, high-value release timelock queue, and comprehensive security features including reentrancy protection and rate limiting

changes: Initial release with basic escrow functionality
Single admin authorization model
Basic fee configuration
Added capability-based authorization system
Enhanced fee configuration with separate lock/release rates
Implemented reentrancy protection
Added rate limiting and anti-abuse mechanisms
Enhanced monitoring and analytics
Added claim period functionality
Added explicit refund eligibility view with deterministic semantics
Added refund approval audit events for approval set/consumption lifecycle
Added upgrade-safe storage marker for refund eligibility schema versioning
Hardened maintenance mode with explicit initialization, idempotent toggling, and audit-friendly v2 events
Added upgrade-safe storage keys for maintenance mode metadata and schema versioning
Added FeeRoutingInvariantChecked audit event — emitted after every fee routing operation to prove distributed_total == fee_amount
Added FeeRoutingSchemaVersionSet event — emitted once during init() for upgrade-safe schema versioning
Added reason field to MaintenanceModeChangedV2 for complete audit trail
Added InvalidBatchSize error code for batch size governance
Added BatchSizeCaps and FeeRoutingSchemaVersion DataKey variants for upgrade-safe storage
Fee routing invariant is now enforced on-chain: last destination absorbs rounding remainder ensuring exact accounting
query_whitelist and query_blocklist now return ParticipantListPage with items, total, offset, and has_more fields for clear pagination semantics
Added get_whitelist_count and get_blocklist_count view functions for O(1) total-count queries
Added ParticipantFilterQueried audit event emitted on every query_whitelist/query_blocklist call for off-chain audit trails
Limit argument silently capped at MAX_PARTICIPANT_FILTER_PAGE_SIZE (50) to bound per-call ledger cost
Added ParticipantListSchemaVersion storage key initialized on contract init for upgrade-safe storage versioning
Added get_participant_schema_version view and ParticipantListSchemaVersionSet audit event for upgrade verification
Added high-value release timelock queue: releases at or above a configurable threshold are queued with a mandatory delay before execution
Added set_high_value_config (admin) to configure threshold and duration; both must be > 0
Added get_high_value_config view to read current configuration
Added get_queued_release view to inspect a pending queued release
Added execute_queued_release (permissionless after delay) to finalize a queued release; respects maintenance mode, escrow freeze, and applies release fees
Added cancel_queued_release (admin) to cancel a pending queued release
Added DataKey::HighValueConfig, DataKey::QueuedRelease(u64), and DataKey::HighValueConfigSchemaVersion storage keys
Added HighValueConfigUpdated, ReleaseQueued, QueuedReleaseExecuted, ReleaseQueueCancelled, and HighValueConfigSchemaVersionSet audit events
Added TimelockNotElapsed (53) and ReleaseAlreadyQueued (54) error codes
Added get_high_value_config_schema_version view for upgrade safety checks
Issue #1032: reinforced fee routing invariants with explicit status-transition coverage for invalid share sums and exact fee split accounting
Issue #1036: validated runtime batch size cap semantics in status-transition suite to protect independent lock/release limits
Issue #1039: added participant filter pagination status-transition coverage for deterministic total/offset/has_more semantics and hard page-size cap behavior
Preserved upgrade-safe storage semantics for FeeRoutingSchemaVersion, BatchSizeCaps, and ParticipantListSchemaVersion

public.name: lock_funds
public.description: Lock funds into escrow for a bounty

parameters.name: deadline
parameters.description: Timestamp when funds can be refunded

public.name: release_with_capability
public.description: Release funds using a capability token

public.name: refund_funds
public.description: Refund funds to depositor after deadline

public.name: authorize_claim
public.description: Authorize a pending claim instead of immediate release

public.name: claim
public.description: Claim funds from an authorized pending claim

public.name: issue_capability
public.description: Issue a capability token for delegated operations

parameters.name: holder
parameters.description: Address that can use the capability

parameters.name: amount_limit
parameters.description: Maximum amount this capability can release

public.name: batch_lock_funds
public.description: Lock funds for multiple bounties in one transaction

public.name: batch_release_funds
public.description: Release funds for multiple bounties in one transaction

public.name: accept_admin
public.description: Accept a pending admin role after timelock expires

view.name: get_filter_mode
view.description: Get current participant filter mode

view.name: get_whitelist_count
view.description: Return total number of allowlisted addresses

view.name: get_blocklist_count
view.description: Return total number of blocklisted addresses

view.name: get_participant_schema_version
view.description: Return participant list storage schema version initialized during init()

returns.description: Participant list storage schema version; 1 for the current whitelist/blocklist index layout

view.name: query_whitelist
view.description: Get paginated allowlist participants with total count and has_more metadata. Limit silently capped at 50.

returns.description: Page of allowlisted addresses with items, total, offset, and has_more fields

view.name: query_blocklist
view.description: Get paginated blocklist participants with total count and has_more metadata. Limit silently capped at 50.

returns.description: Page of blocklisted addresses with items, total, offset, and has_more fields

view.name: get_escrow
view.description: Get escrow details by bounty ID

view.name: get_capability
view.description: Get capability details by ID

view.name: get_fee_config
view.description: Get current fee configuration

view.name: get_batch_size_caps
view.description: Get the effective batch size caps for batch lock and batch release

returns.description: Current effective batch size cap configuration

view.name: get_high_value_config
view.description: Get the current high-value release timelock configuration, or None if not set.

returns.description: Timelock threshold and duration, or None.

view.name: get_queued_release
view.description: Get the pending queued release for a bounty, or None if no release is queued.

returns.description: Queued release entry (contributor, amount, executable_at), or None.

view.name: get_multisig_config
view.description: Get multisig configuration

view.name: get_pause_flags
view.description: Get current pause status

view.name: dry_run_lock
view.description: Simulate lock operation without state changes

view.name: dry_run_release
view.description: Simulate release operation without state changes

view.name: dry_run_refund
view.description: Simulate refund operation without state changes

view.name: get_refund_eligibility_view
view.description: Return deterministic typed refund eligibility status, amount, and recipient preview

returns.description: Eligibility state with explicit semantic code and preview fields

view.name: get_refund_schema_version
view.description: Return the upgrade-safe schema marker for refund eligibility view semantics

returns.description: Refund eligibility schema version, or 0 for legacy deployments without the marker

view.name: health_check
view.description: Get contract health status

view.name: get_analytics
view.description: Get usage analytics

view.name: is_maintenance_mode
view.description: Check if maintenance mode is active

returns.description: True if maintenance mode is enabled, false otherwise

view.name: get_high_value_config
view.description: Get the current high-value release timelock configuration

returns.description: Threshold and duration, or None if not configured

view.name: get_queued_release
view.description: Get the pending queued release for a bounty, if any

admin.name: init
admin.description: Initialize the contract with admin and token

admin.name: update_fee_config
admin.description: Update fee configuration

admin.name: update_multisig_config
admin.description: Update multisig configuration

admin.name: approve_large_release
admin.description: Approve large release requiring multisig

admin.name: set_paused
admin.description: Update pause flags for operations

admin.name: set_claim_window
admin.description: Set claim window duration. Emits ClaimWindowSet audit event. Set to 0 to disable enforcement.

parameters.name: claim_window
parameters.description: Seconds beneficiary has to claim after authorization. 0 disables enforcement.

admin.name: set_maintenance_mode
admin.description: Update maintenance mode (admin only)

admin.name: emergency_withdraw
admin.description: Emergency withdraw all funds (requires lock_paused=true)

admin.name: update_risk_flags
admin.description: Updates the risk flags for a specific bounty (replaces entire bitmask)

parameters.name: new_flags
parameters.description: New bitmask of risk flags (bits outside RISK_FLAG_MASK_ALL are rejected)

admin.name: set_escrow_risk_flags
admin.description: OR flag_bits onto stored risk flags for a bounty (admin only). Returns updated EscrowMetadata.

parameters.name: bounty_id
parameters.description: Bounty identifier (metadata created with zero defaults if absent)

parameters.name: flag_bits
parameters.description: Bits to set; rejected if outside RISK_FLAG_MASK_ALL

returns.description: Updated metadata reflecting new flag state

admin.name: clear_escrow_risk_flags
admin.description: AND-NOT flag_bits from stored risk flags for a bounty (admin only). Returns updated EscrowMetadata.

parameters.name: flag_bits
parameters.description: Bits to clear; rejected if outside RISK_FLAG_MASK_ALL

returns.description: Updated metadata reflecting new flag state

admin.name: update_metadata
admin.description: Write repo_id, issue_id, bounty_type, and reference_hash for a bounty. Caller must be admin or a registered governor. Preserves risk_flags and notification_prefs.

parameters.name: caller
parameters.description: Address performing the update; must be admin or governor

admin.name: get_metadata
admin.description: Returns full EscrowMetadata for a bounty; zeroed defaults when absent

admin.name: add_risk_governor
admin.description: Adds an address to the risk-flag governor list (admin only, max 16 entries)

parameters.name: governor
parameters.description: Address to authorize for risk-flag mutations

admin.name: set_escrow_risk_flags
admin.description: Sets specific risk flag bits using OR operation (granular governance)

parameters.name: flags_to_set
parameters.description: Bitmask of flags to set (OR operation)

returns.description: Updated metadata with new risk flags

admin.name: clear_escrow_risk_flags
admin.description: Clears specific risk flag bits using AND NOT operation (granular governance)

parameters.name: flags_to_clear
parameters.description: Bitmask of flags to clear (AND NOT operation)

returns.description: Updated metadata with cleared risk flags

admin.name: update_metadata
admin.description: Updates metadata fields for a bounty with validation

parameters.name: reference_hash
parameters.description: Optional reference hash for the bounty

admin.name: set_maintenance_mode
admin.description: Toggle global maintenance mode

admin.name: set_high_value_config
admin.description: Configure the threshold and delay for high-value releases

admin.name: set_batch_size_caps
admin.description: Set independent runtime caps for batch_lock_funds and batch_release_funds. Both caps must satisfy 1 <= cap <= MAX_BATCH_SIZE (20). Emits BatchSizeCapsUpdated.

parameters.name: lock_cap
parameters.description: Maximum items allowed in a single batch_lock_funds call (1..=20)

parameters.name: release_cap
parameters.description: Maximum items allowed in a single batch_release_funds call (1..=20)

admin.name: set_high_value_config
admin.description: Configure the high-value release timelock. Releases at or above threshold are queued for duration seconds before execution. Emits HighValueConfigUpdated.

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: Minimum amount (inclusive) that triggers the timelock queue. Must be > 0.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Delay in seconds before a queued release becomes executable. Must be > 0.

admin.name: cancel_queued_release
admin.description: Cancel a pending queued high-value release. The escrow remains Locked. Emits ReleaseQueueCancelled.

parameters.name: bounty_id
parameters.description: Bounty whose queued release should be cancelled.

admin.name: execute_queued_release
admin.description: Execute a queued high-value release once its timelock has elapsed. Permissionless — anyone may call after executable_at. Respects maintenance mode and release pause flags. Respects escrow freeze and contributor address freeze. Applies release fees consistently with release_funds. Emits QueuedReleaseExecuted.

parameters.name: bounty_id
parameters.description: Bounty whose queued release should be executed.

view_entrypoints_fee_routing.name: get_fee_routing
view_entrypoints_fee_routing.description: Return the per-bounty fee routing override for bounty_id, or None when no override is set.

returns.description: Per-bounty routing config, or None if using global routing.

parameters.name: MAX_BATCH_SIZE
parameters.description: Compile-time hard upper bound for admin-configurable batch caps

parameters.name: lock_fee_rate
parameters.description: Fee rate for lock operations in basis points

parameters.name: release_fee_rate
parameters.description: Fee rate for release operations in basis points

parameters.name: claim_window
parameters.description: Seconds beneficiary has to claim after authorization

parameters.name: admin_rotation_timelock_duration
parameters.description: Delay in seconds before a pending admin can accept a rotation

parameters.name: MAX_PARTICIPANT_FILTER_PAGE_SIZE
parameters.description: Hard upper bound on addresses returned per query_whitelist / query_blocklist call. Callers passing a larger limit are silently capped.

storage_keys.name: RefundEligibilitySchemaVersion
storage_keys.description: Version marker for refund eligibility view semantics

storage_keys.name: MaintenanceModeUpdatedAt
storage_keys.description: Timestamp when maintenance mode last changed

storage_keys.name: MaintenanceModeUpdatedBy
storage_keys.description: Admin address that last changed maintenance mode

storage_keys.name: MaintenanceModeSchemaVersion
storage_keys.description: Version marker for maintenance mode semantics

storage_keys.name: ParticipantListSchemaVersion
storage_keys.description: Upgrade-safe marker for participant list (whitelist/blocklist) storage semantics. Initialized to 1 during init(), exposed through get_participant_schema_version, and audited through ParticipantListSchemaVersionSet.

storage_keys.name: HighValueConfig
storage_keys.description: High-value release timelock configuration (threshold and duration). When set, releases at or above threshold are queued.

storage_keys.name: QueuedRelease
storage_keys.description: Per-bounty queued release entry awaiting timelock expiry. Keyed by bounty_id.

storage_keys.name: HighValueConfigSchemaVersion
storage_keys.description: Upgrade-safe schema marker for high-value timelock config storage layout. Initialized to 1 during init(). Increment when HighValueConfig or QueuedRelease layout changes.

security_features: Rate limiting with configurable windows and thresholds
Deterministic maintenance mode semantics with audit events

access_control.description: Single admin with full control over contract

access_control.configuration: Admin issues capabilities with specific permissions and limits

access_control.description: Multiple signatures required for large releases
Prevents abuse through operation frequency limits
access_control.configuration: Configurable window size and operation limits

critical_behaviors.impact: Prevents recursive calls that could drain funds
critical_behaviors.mitigation: Shared reentrancy guard with acquire/release pattern

critical_behaviors.impact: Fees are deducted from amounts and sent to recipient
critical_behaviors.mitigation: Floor rounding ensures fees don't exceed configured rates

critical_behaviors.impact: All operations succeed or fail together (atomic)
critical_behaviors.mitigation: Rollback on any failure in the batch
Timestamp validation on every capability use

critical_behaviors.impact: Funds must be claimed within configured window
critical_behaviors.mitigation: Automatic expiration and refund after window

error_handling.scenario: Attempting to initialize an already initialized contract
error_handling.resolution: Contract can only be initialized once
Initialize contract with admin and token addresses
Ensure caller is admin, capability holder, or authorized signer

error_handling.scenario: Contract doesn't have enough tokens for operation
error_handling.resolution: Ensure sufficient tokens are locked in escrow
Wait until deadline passes before refunding
Wait for admin to unpause or contact admin
Use fee rate within allowed range (0-1000 basis points)

gas_considerations.notes: Involves token transfer and storage writes
Involves token transfer and storage updates
Multiple token transfers and storage writes
Multiple token transfers and storage updates
Large token transfer of all contract balance
Only storage reads, no state changes

events.name: AdminRotationProposed
events.description: Current admin proposed a pending admin rotation

data.name: pending_admin
data.description: Pending admin that may accept after the timelock

events.name: AdminRotationAccepted
events.description: Pending admin accepted and became the new active admin

events.name: AdminRotationCancelled
events.description: Current admin cancelled a pending admin rotation

data.name: admin
data.description: Admin that cancelled the pending rotation

data.name: admin
data.description: Admin that updated the timelock configuration

events.name: RefundApprovalSet
events.description: Admin refund approval created or updated

events.name: RefundApprovalConsumed
events.description: Stored refund approval consumed by refund execution
events.trigger: Successful refund call with admin approval record

events.name: MaintenanceModeChangedV2
events.description: Maintenance mode toggled with previous state (audit-friendly)
events.trigger: Admin toggles maintenance mode (state change only)

events.name: ParticipantFilterQueried
events.description: Emitted on every query_whitelist / query_blocklist call for off-chain audit trails

data.name: list_type
data.description: Which list was queried (Allowlist or Blocklist)

data.name: offset
data.description: Zero-based start index used in this query

data.name: limit
data.description: Effective limit after applying MAX_PARTICIPANT_FILTER_PAGE_SIZE cap

data.name: result_count
data.description: Number of addresses returned in this page

data.name: total
data.description: Total number of addresses in the list at query time

events.trigger: Every call to query_whitelist or query_blocklist

events.name: ParticipantListSchemaVersionSet
events.description: Emitted during init() when the participant list schema version marker is written

tokens.purpose: Escrow token for locking and releasing funds
requirements: Must be approved for contract operations

steps.notes: Save contract ID from deployment output

steps.description: Initialize contract with admin and token
steps.command: stellar contract invoke --id CONTRACT_ID -- init --admin ADMIN_ADDRESS --token TOKEN_ADDRESS
steps.notes: Admin address should be secure (hardware wallet recommended)

steps.command: stellar contract invoke --id CONTRACT_ID -- update_fee_config --lock_fee_rate 10 --release_fee_rate 5 --fee_recipient FEE_RECIPIENT --fee_enabled true
steps.notes: Optional: configure fees according to your needs

steps.command: stellar contract invoke --id CONTRACT_ID -- update_multisig_config --threshold_amount 1000000000 --signers SIGNER1,SIGNER2,SIGNER3 --required_signatures 2
steps.notes: Optional: configure multisig for large releases
Recommended for governance hardening before transferring long-lived admin control
Ensure all tests pass before building
Save the WASM hash from output

steps.command: stellar contract invoke --id TESTNET_CONTRACT_ID -- upgrade --new_wasm_hash WASM_HASH
steps.notes: Verify all functionality works on testnet

steps.command: stellar contract invoke --id MAINNET_CONTRACT_ID -- upgrade --new_wasm_hash WASM_HASH

steps.notes: Track version changes for audit trail

upgrade_process.rollback_procedure: Keep previous WASM hash to enable emergency rollback by calling upgrade with previous hash
